creator: yzlin@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
- Update to 1.8.6
- The following ports would be affected. These should bump share library version
  (from .19 -> .20) or PORTREVISION.
    audio/beast
    audio/glame
    audio/snd
    cad/gwave
    cad/libgeda
    comms/gnuradio
    deskutils/gnotime
    devel/autogen
    devel/g-wrap
    devel/gconf
    devel/guile-lib
    devel/libmatheval
    editors/texmacs
    finance/gnucash
    games/fmars
    games/gnome-games
    games/gnurobots
    games/trackballs
    graphics/graphviz
    irc/bobot++
    lang/gnustep-guile
    lang/mdk
    math/drgeo
    math/guppi
    net-p2p/gnunet
    net/gnu-radius
    net/net-http
    net/serveez
    print/lilypond
    science/libctl
    science/mpb
    security/crank
    sysutils/mcron
    www/elinks
    x11-toolkits/guile-gtk
    x11/xbindkeys

Port maintainer (amatus@gnu.org) is cc'd.
